g.text: Detailed view of registration, signing, proof upload, lookup, verification, and platform trust checks.
• derive kid from public key DER
• registration requires server challenge + App Attest validation + bundle ID match
• proof upload requires a registered kid and a valid signature over canonical payload bytes
• verification recomputes trust server-side using stored proof, stored key, supplied hash, and revocation timing
• public endpoints are rate-limited; admin is private-network only
